channel.title: react.js on Miles Wallace
channel.description: Recent content in react.js on Miles Wallace

item.title: About
item.author: mileswallace@lavabit.com
item.description: 02/18/2023 I designed and developed web applications using JavaScript and Python frameworks Angular.js, React.js and Django. I built API following RESTful standards to allow users to submit information by storing data in PostgreSQL. I assisted in an old Grand Theft Auto 5 mod. and a server. Skills: HTML5, CSS3, SASS, Javascipt, Node, PHP, Python and Ruby. Angular.js, React.js, Django, Bootstrap, jQuery and PostgreSQL. Relevant Courses: Data Structures, Database Management Systems, Responsive Design Form, Software Design Methodology.
